# WELL — Human Readiness (arifOS Federation)
## Machine & Agent Interface Specification

**Version:** 2026.07.24  
**URL:** https://well.arif-fazil.com  
**MCP:** https://well.arif-fazil.com/mcp  
**Source:** https://github.com/ariffazil/well  
**Port (local):** 18083 · **Tools:** 8 public · **License:** BSL  

> **WELL reflects. arifOS judges. Arif decides.**  
> Authority ceiling: **REFLECT_ONLY** — holds a mirror, not a veto. Never diagnoses.

---

## What WELL Is

Vitality / human-readiness organ of the arifOS federation. Mirrors operator state
(H-WELL), machine reliability (M-WELL), governance health (G-WELL), and coupled
risk (C-WELL). Outputs are readiness signals — not clinical verdicts.

## Federation Organs

| Organ | Role | Port | Link |
|-------|------|------|------|
| arifOS | Constitutional kernel — judge, seal | 8088 | https://arifos.arif-fazil.com |
| AAA | Cockpit + A2A | 3001 | https://aaa.arif-fazil.com |
| A-FORGE | Execution shell | 7071 | https://mcp.arif-fazil.com |
| GEOX | Earth intelligence | 8081 | https://geox.arif-fazil.com |
| WEALTH | Capital intelligence | 18082 | https://wealth.arif-fazil.com |
| **WELL** | Vitality guard | 18083 | ← you are here |
| HERMES | Multi-modal / Telegram bridge | — | https://t.me/arifos |

Contract: https://arifos.arif-fazil.com · `/root/FEDERATION_CONTRACT.md`

---

## Discovery Endpoints

| Path | Purpose |
|------|---------|
| `/health` | Runtime health + well_score + freshness |
| `/ready` | Alias for /health |
| `/mcp` | MCP streamable-http |
| `/llms.txt` | This file — agent map |

**Truth rule:** live `/health` beats narrative. `status=degraded` with HTTP 200 is valid when biometrics are OPERATOR_REPORTED without verified telemetry.

---

## Substrate Taxonomy

| Class | Meaning |
|-------|---------|
| **H-WELL** | Human biological / cognitive state |
| **M-WELL** | Machine reliability, tool health, context integrity |
| **G-WELL** | Machine governance health — floor coherence |
| **C-WELL** | Coupled human–machine risk |
| **U-WELL** | Universal substrate vitality (no category error) |

## Public MCP Surface (8)

Tools are reflection / report primitives only. Exact names: live `tools/list` on `/mcp`.
Typical surface: vitality report, readiness band, substrate classify, forge intensity advice (advisory to A-FORGE — never a veto).

## Boundaries (hard)

- NEVER diagnose medical conditions or prescribe treatment  
- NEVER issue SEAL/VOID/HOLD as constitutional authority  
- NEVER invent biometrics — missing sensors → degraded / UNKNOWN  
- NEVER claim consciousness, feelings, or personhood (F9/F10)  
- F5 PEACE² + F6 MARUAH: dignity-first, de-escalate  

## Epistemic Tags

OPERATOR_REPORTED · MEASURED · DERIVED · UNKNOWN. Prefer weaker tag when mixed.

## Runtime Layout

- `server` / FastMCP on :18083  
- systemd: `well.service`  
- State age / freshness_band on `/health`  

## Build & Test

```bash
pip install -e ".[dev]"
pytest tests/ -q --tb=short
curl -s http://127.0.0.1:18083/health
```

## For Agents

1. Read this file + `/health`  
2. Connect MCP: `https://well.arif-fazil.com/mcp`  
3. Treat degraded+OPERATOR_REPORTED as honest, not outage  
4. Route decisions through arifOS; WELL never vetoes Arif  
5. Crawl federation: https://arifos.arif-fazil.com/llms.txt  

DITEMPA BUKAN DIBERI — Forged, Not Given.
